space_scope: Europe from Bronze Age (-3000) through the end of WWII (1945). Mediterranean / Levant / North-African neighbors referenced where they intersect European history (Carthage, Byzantine East, Crusader states, Ottoman expansion).

field_notes.macro_period: Large chronological period (Bronze Age, Iron Age, Classical, Migration Period, Early Medieval, High Medieval, Late Medieval, Early Modern, Long 19th, World Wars).
field_notes.dynasty_name: Dynasty, ruling house, civilization phase, or republic/constitutional regime label.
field_notes.modern_admin_units_raw: Pipe-separated ISO3 country codes (FRA|DEU|ITA) + optional ADM1 codes for federations (DE-BY|IT-25|ES-CT).
field_notes.ruler_temple_name: East Asian style field; leave empty for European rulers.
field_notes.v02_*: Retained only for v03 compatibility; empty for non-v02 datasets.
field_notes.ruler_continuity: European succession rules vary (primogeniture, elective monarchy, papal election, republican magistracy). Use documented system per polity.
